---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Deskly
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way? (Not "add X" — the underlying need.)

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why they didn't fit.

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar features elsewhere, anything else useful.
